Question: Match the waste management term with its correct description
Answer:
1) Biodegradable waste - a) Waste that decomposes naturally (food, leaves)
2) Non-biodegradable waste - b) Waste that does not decompose easily (plastic, glass)
3) Composting - c) Conversion of organic waste into manure
4) Recycling - d) Processing waste into new usable products
5) Landfill - e) Site for dumping solid waste
6) Incineration - f) Burning waste at high temperature
7) Segregation - g) Separating waste into different categories
8) Vermicomposting - h) Using earthworms to decompose waste
9) E-waste - i) Discarded electronic items
10) Hazardous waste - j) Waste harmful to health and environment
11) Leachate - k) Polluted liquid from waste in landfills
12) 3Rs - l) Reduce, Reuse, Recycle
13) Circular economy - m) System of reusing and recycling resources
14) Biogas - n) Gas produced from decomposing organic waste
15) Open dumping - o) Unscientific disposal of waste in open areas
